subject: FWD: 100% serious (DEADLINE TONIGHT)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce8/364765926/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce8/364765926/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hey -- wanted to make sure you saw this:
**One of the very last FEC fundraising deadlines of the campaign is midnight TONIGHT** -- it's one of our last chances to stockpile the resources we need to win the election.
With recent polls showing Governor Hassan in a dead heat with Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte, your gift now could be the difference between taking back the Senate or Washington Republicans continuing to put corporate special interests ahead of hard-working families.
**[We've set an aggressive $75,000 goal for today, and right now it's not looking like we'll make it. Please, we need every supporter to step up and give $3 or more now-- that means you, yes you.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce9/364765926/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEctS2lja19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
It's crunch time, and we can't afford to miss this goal and let Ayotte and the Washington GOP keep obstructing progress for families.
Thanks for stepping up.
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Wednesday, October 19 at 10:16 AM, MaggieHassan.com
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
I really hate to lose, team.
But our race here in New Hampshire is practically guaranteed to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and poll after poll shows that thanks to support from Ayotte's corporate special interest backers, Governor Hassan is locked in a dead heat with Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte.
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce9/364765926/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEctS2lja19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
The LAST FEC fundraising deadline before the election is tonight and if we're going to move these polls in our favor before Election Day, we HAVE to raise $75,000 by midnight.
**Our records indicate that you may be able to help us get there with a $3 donation. So, I'm asking you directly:[Give $3 or more before the midnight deadline so that together we can help Maggie take the lead in the polls, win back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce9/364765926/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEctS2lja19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0cea/364765926/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEctS2lja19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce9/364765926/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEctS2lja19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Look, this race is as tight as they come, so we're 100% serious when we tell you that your gift right now could be the difference between winning here in New Hampshire and handing the Senate to Washington Republicans. I don't know about you, but I don't want to wake up on November 9th wishing we had done more.
Please, donate $3 -- every dollar you can -- here: **[http://maggiehassan.com/FEC-deadline](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb91/2a380d31/17ef13ef/fc0ce9/364765926/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE5X0ZFQy1NUEctS2lja19uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161019_FEC-MPG-Kick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Are you still up?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I’m just getting off stage and we still have time before tonight’s final deadline. |

Friend, Tonight it was us against the world... And we won. We showed the world that our country can once again be run by the AMERICAN PEOPLE -- not the special interests, not the lobbyists, not the Washington bureaucrats. Friend, and as I’m stepping off the stage, I want to remind you that there is less than 10 minutes left until the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election. Tonight’s deadline is our opportunity to show the media, to show Hillary, to show the WORLD what’s coming on November 8. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15 before the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election to help us SURGE in the polls after tonight’s debate. The debates might be over, but the fight’s just getting started. The Clinton Cartel is going to bombard you with the nastiest lies and attacks you’ve ever seen. And the 24/7 media machine will back up every single one of her attacks, all while willfully turning a blind eye to her worst acts of corruption. We must stand our ground. We must cut through the noise to deliver our message straight to the American voter. The future of our country depends upon it. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15 before TONIGHT’s FINAL FEC deadline to help us SURGE in the polls. Thank you, Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:

_**BEFORE THE DEBATE: Must-See Poll Numbers Show a TIGHT Race!**_
[**Pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before midnight 's FEC deadline >>**](https://secure.dscc. Friend, with the last debate about to start, our key races could not be ANY closer:
➜ Katie McGinty (Pennsylvania): 2 POINTS **_AHEAD!_**
➜ Jason Kander (Missouri): 2 POINTS _**BEHIND!**_
➜ Deborah Ross (North Carolina): _**TIED!**_
➜ Maggie Hassan (New Hampshire): _**TIED!**_ Four key states, one unmistakable message: **Only the full support of our grassroots can get Democrats over the top in these states -- and send McConnell into a full-on PANIC.**

That's why tonight's FEC deadline (the last one before Election Day) is so important. **But right now, we 're on the verge of MISSING our projections!**

**Tonight 's TRIPLE-MATCH makes right now the perfect time for you to step up, Friend. Will you pitch in to take your support FOUR TIMES further?**

name: Senator Elizabeth Warren
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aaa/24c69fd9/d18586c/18ea5005/1388430587/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

We absolutely, positively must win the White House on November 8th.

But if Hillary is going to get her Supreme Court nominees on the bench, and get her cabinet nominees confirmed, and have a fighting chance at getting her policies signed into law, then we MUST flip the Senate this year.

And -- heaven forbid -- if the unthinkable happens and Donald Trump wins, controlling the Senate could be the only thing that stops that man's reckless agenda.

That's why I've been crisscrossing the country to campaign for smart, tough, experienced Senate candidates running in tight races -- many of whom are EMILY's List candidates. Think about it: We need to flip five seats, and there are SIX EMILY's List women running against incumbent Republicans.

During my Senate race in 2012 against a Republican senator, EMILY's List told me: If I stepped up to fight, they'd have my back every step of the way. And they did.

Now it's time to step up and fight for **Maggie Hassan** in New Hampshire, **Patty Judge** in Iowa, **Deborah Ross** in North Carolina, **Ann Kirkpatrick** in Arizona, **Tammy Duckworth** in Illinois, and **Katie McGinty** in Pennsylvania in their races too.

We also have critical Senate seats to hold. That's why we need to make sure **Catherine Cortez Masto** wins her tough race in Nevada -- where the polls are neck-and-neck. And we're making sure our champion **Patty Murray** wins her reelection, and **Kamala Harris** wins in California, too.

**[It's time to get to work. Donate now to help flip the Senate and elect all nine EMILY's List Senate candidates this year-- 100% of your donation will go directly to their campaigns.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aaa/24c69fd9/d18586c/18ea5006/1388430587/VEsE/ "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/elect-senate-women?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Its+time+to+get+to+work+Donate+now+to+he&utm_campaign=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all")**

If these candidates win in three weeks, they are going to turn the Senate upside down -- and that's exactly what we need right now.

Whether it's Tammy and Ann, who have already cosponsored the Paycheck Fairness Act in the House, or Maggie, who expanded Medicaid as governor in New Hampshire, I trust these women to fight for American families.

They all have the track record to show it. Deborah fought to protect Planned Parenthood funding when she was in the North Carolina General Assembly. Katie's worked hard to clean up our air and water. In California, Kamala wrote a Homeowner Bill of Rights after the 2008 mortgage crisis -- the first of its kind! And Patty Murray, our top Democrat on the Health, Education, Labor and Pensions Committee that I sit on, has used her role to fight for women's health.

These women will fight for the right things, like Patty Judge's commitment to paid family and medical leave for all and Catherine's dedication to protect Social Security.

So it's time to step up and help elect these women -- and a Senate majority that fights for these kinds of issues. I like our odds but only if we can count on everyone to help get it done.

**Donate to help flip the Senate with EMILY's List candidates. 100% of your donation will go directly to these Senate candidates' campaigns:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Give-to-Flip-the-Senate](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aaa/24c69fd9/d18586c/18ea5007/1388430587/VEsF/ "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/elect-senate-women?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGivetoFliptheSen&utm_campaign=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all")**

Thank you,

Senator Elizabeth Warren

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0aaa/24c69fd9/d18586c/18ea5000/1388430587/VEsC/ "https://emilyslist.org/bundle/elect-senate-women?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all&source=WPEFCV51N_digital_email_20161019_Warren_n-all")

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Here's something we bet you're thinking right now, sisters and brothers. We bet this final presidential debate really makes you want to have the most progressive Congress possible next year.
Imagine a Congress that has a Democratic majority in the Senate, and Bernie Sanders with a gavel in his hand. We'd have Elizabeth Warren in the Senate majority, and maybe even a majority in the House of Representatives. But first, we have to win in November.
We're making huge progress towards our goal of raising $2 million in two days for House and Senate candidates, but we're still short of our goal before tonight's final fundraising deadline.
[**Can you split a $3 contribution between Deborah Ross, Catherine Cortez Masto, Russ Feingold, Maggie Hassan, Katie McGinty, Paul Clements, Chase Iron Eyes, Rick Nolan, Nanette Barragan, Zephyr Teachout, Pramila Jayapal, Morgan Carroll, and Tom Nelson before midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/13-leaders?refcode=em161019-pm2-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/13-leaders?refcode=em161019-pm2-full-s")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/13-leaders?refcode=em161019-pm2-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/13-leaders?refcode=em161019-pm2-full-s")
[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/13-leaders?refcode=em161019-pm2-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/13-leaders?refcode=em161019-pm2-full-s")
When people stand together, there's nothing we can't accomplish.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | | Friend

I just got back to the green room with Barbara and Justin and we’re all so excited about how the last hour went. I laid out my vision for our state and what I will do to move us forward.

It is your support that has brought us to this moment, a moment of celebration, reflection, and anticipation of a victory on November 8th. Ballots drop this week, so keep us in your thoughts, make sure you’re talking to your neighbors about voting, and stay tuned for ways to get involved with your local and statewide races!

Soon, we’ll have [the debate footage up on our website](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=84c599cdc8&e=32f1a3df98). Please share it with your friends and family who might not have had the chance to watch.

Bill

Sent from my iPhone

---

PO Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Leaving now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington __
body:
Our final debate just finished. | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcyMzc4MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTU1ODY2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Friend, I'm just leaving the final debate with my opponent. It was terrific to be in the Tri-Cities. Most of all, I hope I made you proud! Look, my opponent was predictable with his responses, and his distortions of my record. He has failed to share a real vision on how to move our state forward -- so he resorts to attacks. That's fine. I can take it. I'm in this fight because there's so much at stake this year -- we've made too much progress to turn back now. I know we can continue moving forward. When I took office four years ago, we were emerging from the dark depths of the Great Recession. Our economy was lagging, people were suffering, and many were pessimistic about Washington's future. **Working together, we 've turned it around.** Over the next four years, all of us must continue building sustainable growth, leveling the playing field for hardworking people, fighting for economic justice, and making a 21st-century education available and affordable from Pre-K to college. And, together, we'll continue tackling the generational challenge of combatting climate change. That's why we need to work around the clock from now until Election Day -- because too much is at stake to do anything less. We must defeat Republican Bill Bryant. **And we must win the right way: by offering a vision for our state that works for every Washington family.** [**Can you contribute right now to make sure we win in November?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcyMzc4MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTU1ODY2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Let's get to work! Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcyMzc4MQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTU1ODY2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: America doesn’t need a puppet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
body:
Peter, you heard me say it last night, Hillary Clinton is a
puppet.

During her whole career, one thing that stands out is she always
pushes the agenda of the elite liberal donor class.

She has no principles of her own, and she has never - not even
once - put your interests ahead of the Wall Street billionaires
and Hollywood liberals who stuff her pockets.

America needs an independent thinker, a leader free of the
corrupt insiders who use their money to rig things against you.

I have spent my whole campaign with one goal in mind, putting
someone who will work for the American people back in the White
House.

Peter, I'm asking you today to make a contribution of $250,
$100, $75, $50 or $25 to our movement because we must fight to
Make America Great Again!
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49288116:6PrsyumjN:m:3:1516426255:D005F9BF74D961379C32AD7B2DF11901:r

After last night's final debate, it is clear I am the qualified
choice for President of the United States.

Your urgent support is critical today, because if Crooked Hillary
gets in the White House she will continue doing the bidding of
globalist campaign donors who do not care about the American
people.

When her donors want open borders, Hillary wants open borders.

When her donors want job-killing "free" trade agreements (like
TPP), Hillary helps to draft those agreements (and then pretends
to oppose them on the campaign trail).

When her donors want a 500% increase in Syrian refugees, Hillary
falls in line and demands that your neighborhood (but not hers)
swing open your doors for un-vetted people from nations filled
with terrorists.

If you look closely enough during her debates and campaign
events, you might even be able to see strings coming up from
Crooked Hillary's arms!

America doesn't need a puppet, America needs a leader.

It's time to cut the cord! Help me put Americans like you first
with a pro-jobs, pro-borders, pro-law and order agenda in the
White House.

Make one donation of $250, $100, $75, $50 or $25 to end Crooked
Hillary's disastrous puppet show in DC.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49288116:6PrsyumjN:m:3:1516426255:D005F9BF74D961379C32AD7B2DF11901:r

Thank you!

Donald J. Trump
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/49288116:6PrsyumjN:m:3:1516426255:D005F9BF74D961379C32AD7B2DF11901:r

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are
not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: We Must Restore the Voting Rights Act
body:
[](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sZomi/6/6o/r5cs/6FOdLu/vp6SGp4QBa)
[**Protect voters in time for Election Day 2016**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sZomi/s/6o/r5cs/6FOdLu/zFQuvxUcRm)

Dear Activist,
**[](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sZomi/v/6o/r5cs/6FOdLu/6UEcfdpz2A)We are weeks away from the presidential election and our most effective tool for protecting voters has been weakened.**
[**Please join me in urging Congress to hold a hearing on restoring the Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) to its full power right away**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sZomi/z/6o/r5cs/6FOdLu/60lCnX2gKa).
This year marks the 51st anniversary of the VRA, one of the most important and effective civil rights laws ever passed. But in the wake of the Supreme Court's 2013 _Shelby County_ decision, which gutted Section 5 of the VRA, a wave of discriminatory voting changes have been unleashed on communities of color, affecting millions of voters.
In fact, this will be the first presidential election in more than half a century without the full protections of the Voting Rights Act in place.
**[](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sZomi/U/6o/r5cs/6FOdLu/sRu4ysXNqL)The NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund (LDF) is a nonpartisan, nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization that has been at the forefront of civil rights litigation and advocacy for over 75 years.** LDF has aggressively challenged barriers to voting in court, but without the full protections of the VRA, discriminatory legislation will keep coming up.
Senate Judiciary Committee Chairman Chuck Grassley and House Judiciary Committee Chairman Bob Goodlatte have the power to hold a hearing **right now** about restoring these protections.
Help us send a strong message that we will not stand by as millions of voters are stripped of their democratic right to vote. [**Sign the petition now**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/sZomi/j/6o/r5cs/6FOdLu/6TKaoapczz).
Onward,
Sherrilyn A. Ifill
President and Director-Counsel

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNzkvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8zOTAyODA1Mw==)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

body:
This race is a dead heat and EVERY vote is going to count! Thank you for standing with Greg. | | |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38239188:s1YAT8uJN:m:1:1369946915:D98A0BB1EA40BC7AFDACD2BEDC3D168C:r) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

Have you seen the latest polls? The race for governor is now a DEAD HEAT and we have tremendous momentum.

**We 're on the verge of winning this election, and getting Montana on track to a more secure and prosperous future!**

But we can't do it without out you, Friend - this race will come down to the wire, and every vote matters.

With just 19 days to go, it's CRUCIAL that we have your vote for Greg Gianforte and Lesley Robinson for Governor and Lieutenant Governor. They will be an amazing team in Helena with your help!

So here's what we're asking you to do:
1. If you requested and received an absentee ballot, please complete and return it today;
2. If you have not requested an absentee ballot, please mark your calendar to vote at your polling location on November 8th;
3. Forward this email to your family, friends and neighbors, and encourage them to cast their votes for Greg and Lesley;
4. [**Click here if you 'd like to get more involved**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38239189:s1YAT8uJN:m:1:1369946915:D98A0BB1EA40BC7AFDACD2BEDC3D168C:r) and help put us over the top, by making phone calls, installing a yard sign, or going door to door to share Greg's message!

This election is so important to Montana's future - for Greg and Lesley, it's about getting government out of the way, creating high-wage jobs and opportunity so we stop losing our young people, standing up for our Montana traditions and protecting our incredible way of life.

**Please make sure to cast your vote for Gianforte/Robinson, and share the word with family, friends and neighbors.**

Thank you!

Team Gianforte |

name: John Carney
subject: Opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-733456573069787136/2529079054024310784?midqs=-4110379084905709568)
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-733456573069787136/2601136648062238720?midqs=-4110379084905709568) Friend, Delaware's economic future is looking very different from its past. When I was growing up in Claymont, all of my neighbors worked at DuPont, the steel mill, or the GM plant. Many of these jobs are gone, but it's as important as ever to provide Delawareans with well-paying, middle class jobs of the future. Delaware is transitioning into an innovation, start-up economy, and it is my intention to promote a strong economy by creating an environment where businesses can thrive and invest in our state. To accomplish this goal, I've laid out an economic development plan centered around five pillars: 1\. Creating new "old" jobs. We must: revitalize old abandoned industrial sites; expand the Port of Wilmington's operations; and maximize the contracting opportunities for minority-owned, women-owned and small businesses that want to engage in business relations with state agencies. **2\. Building Delaware 's innovation economy. ** We must restructure the Delaware Economic Development Office to be more entrepreneurial and proactive. We need to strengthen the entrepreneurial environment for startup companies through the development of a science and technology plan, work closely with private businesses to attract more venture capital, and expand open data and broadband access. ****3\. S** trengthening Delaware's world-class workforce.** The real key to our economic future is our people, and we will need to ensure that our state has a skilled workforce through the expansion of career pathways programs and programs that give veterans a head-start on construction and other skill-related careers. 4\. Cutting red tape that stifles economic growth. I plan to pursue legislation that would designate one state entity where companies seeking to create good-paying, middle class jobs could secure all necessary permits and other requirements under a fast-track system. Our state's regulation environment also needs to be streamlined to create a clear, predictable environment for business. 5\. Growing Delaware's agriculture economy. A significant portion of Delaware's economy is rooted in agriculture. We must support the agricultural sector of our state through improving environmentally-friendly practices, reducing permitting barriers for small businesses, preserving farmland, and promoting agribusiness through trade with our North American and South American neighbors. I understand that Delaware's economy is in transition, but I believe we can use this transition as an opportunity for economic growth. [**Read my full economic development policy platform by clicking here**.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-733456573069787136/2673194242100166656?midqs=-4110379084905709568) Thanks for your continued support, John
---

clean_body: Friend, Delaware's economic future is looking very different from its past. When I was growing up in Claymont, all of my neighbors worked at DuPont, the steel mill, or the GM plant. Many of these jobs are gone, but it's as important as ever to provide Delawareans with well-paying, middle class jobs of the future. Delaware is transitioning into an innovation, start-up economy, and it is my intention to promote a strong economy by creating an environment where businesses can thrive and invest in our state. To accomplish this goal, I've laid out an economic development plan centered around five pillars: 1\. Creating new "old" jobs. We must: revitalize old abandoned industrial sites; expand the Port of Wilmington's operations; and maximize the contracting opportunities for minority-owned, women-owned and small businesses that want to engage in business relations with state agencies. 2\. Building Delaware 's innovation economy. We must restructure the Delaware Economic Development Office to be more entrepreneurial and proactive. We need to strengthen the entrepreneurial environment for startup companies through the development of a science and technology plan, work closely with private businesses to attract more venture capital, and expand open data and broadband access. **3\. S trengthening Delaware's world-class workforce.** The real key to our economic future is our people, and we will need to ensure that our state has a skilled workforce through the expansion of career pathways programs and programs that give veterans a head-start on construction and other skill-related careers. 4\. Cutting red tape that stifles economic growth. I plan to pursue legislation that would designate one state entity where companies seeking to create good-paying, middle class jobs could secure all necessary permits and other requirements under a fast-track system. Our state's regulation environment also needs to be streamlined to create a clear, predictable environment for business. 5\. Growing Delaware's agriculture economy. A significant portion of Delaware's economy is rooted in agriculture. We must support the agricultural sector of our state through improving environmentally-friendly practices, reducing permitting barriers for small businesses, preserving farmland, and promoting agribusiness through trade with our North American and South American neighbors. I understand that Delaware's economy is in transition, but I believe we can use this transition as an opportunity for economic growth. Thanks for your continued support, John | Paid for by Friends for John Carney Friends for John Carney 19 E Commons Blvd 2nd Floor New Castle DE 19720 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Lt. Governor Eric Holcomb
subject: Are you voting this year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This is an historic election year – and that’s especially true right here in Indiana. So it’s vitally important that every Hoosier who can vote does. | | | | | | | |
---|---|---
| | | | Friend, This is an historic election year – and that’s especially true right here in Indiana. So it’s vitally important that every Hoosier who can vote does. Your voice will decide the direction our state will go. Your vote will either help us continue the momentum that started 12 years ago with common sense Republican leadership, or take us back to the debt and dysfunction of the past. **That’s why there are multiple ways to vote – so that every single ballot can be cast and counted. How do you plan on voting this year?**
---
| | [ **** Absentee ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/dea0be55203a4c48843aa4575f112903?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=1f0800ea278a4ad7b0e6a05dd90ef772&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_1&utm_term=vote_vbm&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161020-are-you-voting-this-year-20318-vote&utm_pagename=absentee%20ballot)
---
| | [ **** Early Vote ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/d214f3bede79447b964d935d449df4de?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=1f0800ea278a4ad7b0e6a05dd90ef772&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_2&utm_term=vote_ev&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161020-are-you-voting-this-year-20318-vote&utm_pagename=early%20vote)
---
| | [ **** Vote on Election Day ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/828953524032450589f26d452c9229d2?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=1f0800ea278a4ad7b0e6a05dd90ef772&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=button_body_text_3&utm_term=vote_ed&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161020-are-you-voting-this-year-20318-vote&utm_pagename=election%20day)
---
| | | | **Let us know so that we can update you with all the important information you need to vote how you prefer.**
Whether it’s absentee voting, early voting, or waiting until Election Day, we hope you will plan ahead and take the time out of your schedule to make your voice count. Thank you,Eric HolcombLt. Governor

name: Ben Carson
subject: The final countdown
body:
Peter,

Let me cut right to the chase -- November 8th is less than 3
weeks away.

My Faith Votes needs your support before the clock runs out.

If you haven't made a donation yet, this is the time. If you
have, please consider doing so again.

In 2012, 25 million registered Christians didn't vote.

Will you make a tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help
ensure that doesn't happen again in 2016?
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38257214:sEXLC8u4N:m:3:876315805:127F9B97B369986FA45656C1B0F19EA0:r

The final presidential debate is now over and there will not be
another large event to attract everyone's attention. This is the
time for the hard work. The boots on the ground.

If we are going to get Christians to the polls we are going to
need the resources to make it happen, and these next 3 weeks are
absolutely crucial.

There is too much at stake for millions of believers to sit on
the sidelines.

Thank you for your commitment.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Maggie For NH Polling Team
subject: Swing the polls [need you, team]

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdbed/2a380d31/17e161fc/fc0d75/3821088856/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

| [Donate to Defeat Common Core!](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbXaG3KX5kcffEdOsQijnjeMJx-2B9zF9gPJP0gmfo4PhsFbpy4TF085U8Hcm4XE1sFC7peg2mPa-2FnCqi65L6m2kllNXlgIbmtTsTZlVol6vM6ju2Iipq5iZ1D6epCDFHY9kQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxn9k-2FoYGfxZZysjAxzgsWFCPdAGP-2FtYwA3rlsaEW6jEh3P27tmcFWEaWulbMgtM-2BbshyuaSBLpU28pNu0TiXoSV6A5LGxRwMb5oJibxD5R-2F4rwpBr-2FvYvchpRsGGSDyzLrUyzR4Bmkj8KFDbExCYl5T8mpwuAR2Yc2QQpGpvWz0Mr-2BMeUXD3Qk2NLA8RP7XEfQvwkGipq-2FgCvGhRmNq3ak66VdD0KpxF5-2BQ13jf1fdHzYk5haJ1IBRyJXuEcqf3p6zWzuRrBRz3OoBzFGVr03LT1W8ozo8zrjJqj-2FMSbRJ7URnSVLJ45qlyhGCOW74pB9EFX5-2BzsEr-2FCqQ2psqBHoiy)

---
Dear Peter, The only thing fuzzier than common-core math is a politician's spending habit. Our national debt is proof. You would think by the way some of these establishment hacks spend our money that they wrote the books on common core. While they may not have, the ones who did are pushing their political agenda by trying to buy our Senate seat. They want to send another establishment politician who will maintain their status quo. We can't let that happen. We just unearthed some evidence that establishment politician John Kennedy is being funded by the same guy who pushed Common Core, backed John McCain, and knocked out one of our leading conservatives in the house. **On the other hand, I 'm proud to be known as the anti-Common Core Colonel. **The Common Core lobby knows what I'll do when I get to the Senate, and that's why they're writing BIG checks to my opponents! subject: Join Me On Election Night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We’re choosing one lucky supporter and a guest, and flying them out to the Election Night Party on November 8th . |

Friend, can you imagine our Trump election night party in New York? It’s going to be a HUGE night . . . the party of the year, because it’ll be a party celebrating America’s future and the American people rising up to take back our country. And Friend; I want you to be there with us when it happens. We’re choosing one lucky supporter and a guest, and flying them out to the Election Night Party on November 8th. All you have to do is contribute $3 to be automatically entered to win. Friend, by doing your part and joining Team Trump today, you’ll make sure we win in November, and that our party is a jubilant celebration of true patriots who defeated the liberal elites. Believe me, I will do my part when I become president and take care of the American people. Our campaign has been gaining supporters every day; it’s a movement of patriotic Americans who are tired of being ignored by the Washington liberals and lobbyist insiders. I’m proud to be your voice, Friend, and once I’m president, I’m going to be honored to fight on your behalf to make America safe, successful and respected worldwide once again. Our Election Night Party is going to be a huge celebration for the American people, and I want you to have the chance to be there. Just contribute $3, and you’ll be automatically entered to win a chance to be in New York with me on Election Night. Good luck, Donald Trump
ENTER NOW

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. | This is so exciting -- We have a brand new ad out this week. And we think it could be the most important ad of this entire campaign.

It features a very special guest: President Obama! He emphasizes Patrick's commitment to fighting for immigration reform and working hard for Florida families on the issues that matter. And he speaks in Spanish, directly to Florida's Hispanic communities. [**Watch the new ad now >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e5f/738133e4/328460ec/7f85630a/1446960377/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161020?refcode=pme161020_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e5f/738133e4/328460ec/7f85630a/1446960377/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161020?refcode=pme161020_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

name: Marlon Marshall, HillaryClinton.com
subject: It's go time -- sign up for a volunteer shift now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Derek --

It’s go time! People are officially voting for Hillary all around the country -- it’s incredible seeing all of our work for 18 months paying off!

Now it’s time to start looking ahead to the final four days before Election Day. In order to make sure every one of Hillary’s supporters casts a ballot, we need to have as many one-on-one conversations as we can in those critical days. **[Can we count on you to help? Sign up for a volunteer shift (or a few!) between November 5th and November 8th right now.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The final push before Election Day is one of the most exciting times of the entire campaign, Derek. The energy is electric, the clock is ticking, and you’ll be knocking on doors and making calls knowing that in just a matter of hours, the work you do will directly impact whether Hillary becomes the next President of the United States.

In order to win, we need thousands of people out in your communities -- especially Hillary’s most reliable supporters like you. **Are you in, Derek? Can you set aside some time in the final hours of this campaign to help put Hillary over the top?**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Please believe!

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of States and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

|
**Can't donate your time? Chip in $1 now to help our ground team recruit and train more volunteers:**
| [
](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY4Mzc5NDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzNDk0NzE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! name: Chuck
subject: Two paths
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend --
It is astonishing that there are **only three weeks until we know what future lies ahead for West Virginia**. And it really comes down to one thing: **Whether Bill Cole is elected governor or not.** There is a vast gulf between how Bill Cole would govern West Virginia and how Jim Justice would. Jim Justice is running because he believes that as the states only billionaire, he is entitled to the governor’s mansion. _**Bill Cole, on the other hand, is running because he wants to make government work for West Virginians.**_ The polls show a very close race, and to close that gap and get ahead, we need your immediate help, Friend. **[Can you chip in today whatever your pocketbook will allow?](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1019&n=1 "Donate
Today")** West Virginia simply **cannot afford another Democrat governor who is out of touch with West Virginia**. body:

| We're contacting you because of your past support for Democrats. Deborah Ross is running for Senate in North Carolina, she's been gaining in the polls and her race is attracting national attention. She has a tough fight ahead, and we're hoping we could send you updates on her race. But we don't want to email you if you don't want to us to. Click here to [unsubscribe.](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427fc/2cc31c44/501bb24/19f98465/2103328740/VEsH/ "https://secure.deborahross.com/unsubscribe") Friends,

Our race is heating up.

First, Republican Senator Richard Burr was named one of the "most vulnerable senators" up in the 2016 elections.

Then, North Carolina Republicans passed HB2, a discriminatory law that is costing our state millions of dollars.

**Now, 19 days before the election, a new poll has us within one point.** People are taking notice. But there is one thing that could make this month even better for our team: **You.**

Strong grassroots support is a critical component of our campaign plan. Your involvement is what will help us harness this fresh momentum to build a winning operation in the months ahead. **[If you're ready to fight alongside Deborah from now through Election Day 2016, let us know. Click here and pledge your support today.](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427fc/2cc31c44/501bb24/19f98464/2103328740/VEsE/ "https://secure.deborahross.com/e161020or")**

Deborah has what it takes to bring a fresh perspective to the Senate. She's someone that hard working North Carolinians can rely on to work for them, not for the special interests that are dominating politics these days.

She's got the drive. She's got the momentum. _Now all she needs is to keep building grassroots support._

**[Let Deborah know you're ready to help this campaign succeed. Pledge your support.](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f427fc/2cc31c44/501bb24/19f98464/2103328740/VEsF/ "https://secure.deborahross.com/e161020or")**

Thanks for being a part of this.

Team Ross |

name: Dan Parker, Senior Adviser
subject: Congressman Young v. Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5059c/7be36b49/1e765bf8/78f9fab6/3730527766/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

Hoosiers are hardworking people. We strive to do our jobs to the best of our abilities, pay our taxes, support our families, and retire with the benefits we earned. Unfortunately, people like Congressman Todd Young don't seem to think that last part should apply.

Congressman Young called Social Security -- the program 800,000 Hoosiers rely on -- a "Ponzi scheme." Just recently, he called for raising the retirement age for people of his generation "and beyond." **This is flat-out unacceptable and dangerous for Indiana 's seniors.**

**[Add your name to stand against Congressman Young's radical policies and stand up for seniors >>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5059c/7be36b49/1e765bf8/78f9fab5/3730527766/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-protect-social-security")**

Friend, for someone who claims to want the best for Hoosier families, Congressman Young sure has an interesting way of showing it. He voted to privatize Social Security _multiple times_ \-- endangering the retirement benefits of Hoosiers who worked tirelessly to earn them.

Meanwhile, Evan has a strong record of voting _against_ privatizing Social Security and _against_ cutting seniors' benefits. **And he 'd never advocate for raising the retirement age.** Hoosiers who've worked hard deserve to retire with dignity, not be thrust back into the workforce.

**[Will you sign your name to stand with Evan and protect Indiana's seniors?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5059c/7be36b49/1e765bf8/78f9fab5/3730527766/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-protect-social-security")**

Thanks for all you do,

Dan Parker
Senior Adviser [Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5059c/7be36b49/1e765bf8/78f9fab4/3730527766/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161020&amount=25")
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5059c/7be36b49/1e765bf8/78f9fabb/3730527766/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Chris=20Carr=2C=20Political=20Director?=
subject: Urgent: early voting underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As you read this, Americans are voting. We need to act NOW. |

Friend, I need your help. There’s a common mistake that we have 19 days to elect Donald Trump president and protect our majorities. That kind of thinking sets us up to lose. In just a few days, early voting will have already started in 29 STATES -- including 7 swing states. The election isn’t 19 days from now -- it’s happening RIGHT THIS SECOND. Now is the time to step up and make investments in our nationwide grassroots get-out-the-vote effort. Please make a contribution of $100, $75, $50, $35, or $15 to help us identify and turn out our supporters to elect Donald Trump president and protect our majorities. Americans are voting as you read this email. Every minute we fail to act, another vote is cast for Hillary Clinton. Every second we wait is one more vote for a radical Supreme Court, one more vote for a weaker America, one more vote to kill American jobs, one more vote to leave our border wide open. But with your immediate contribution, we can sharpen our voter targeting and turn-out efforts at this critical moment and ensure that we’re getting our supporters out to vote. If we wait until Election Day, we’re guaranteed to lose... Now is the time to turn out voters. And we need your help to do it. Please make an urgent contribution of $100, $75, $50, $35, $15, or any amount you can spare to help us elect Donald Trump president and protect our majorities. Let’s win, Chris Carr RNC Political Director
CONTRIBUTE $100

There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

name: Steve Bullock
subject: What will really make the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

A huge thank you to everyone who pitched in before our final big financial deadline. **The continued outpouring of support is why -- despite Greg Gianforte's millions -- we're closing out this race strong.**

This election is about the future of our state for my kids and yours. Last weekend, my son Cam and I went out knocking on doors -- because **I firmly believe that what will really make a difference is Montanans talking to Montanans over the next 18 days.**

We're two days away from our last Weekend of Action before our Get Out The Vote push begins. [**Can I count on you to sign up for a shift or two?**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=C9kPLbmveKovx%2BKieVcb1FjY5ycSzF7e)

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=mjL2yz8Jw1MEl7j%2B4A2cHVjY5ycSzF7e)
---

Taking a couple hours out of your day on Saturday or Sunday is one of the most powerful things you can do to help ensure we win. And Cam and I had a blast.

Thanks for everything,

Steve Bullock
****
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=cvQ30RlCqIUG9ZjXIi6wjFjY5ycSzF7e)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vOK0E56EByF99hKjo%2F4wo1jY5ycSzF7e).

Friends of Steve Bullock

Helena MT 59624 United States

subject: Are you joining me this weekend?

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jason=20Roe?=
subject: Press Release: I will be an activist Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=b9da823748&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | For Immediate Release
Contact: Jason Roe (253)220-5051
Jason@BillBryantForGovernor.com
**Bryant Lays Out Vision for Washington**
**“I will be an activist Governor”**
(Pasco, Wash.) – Last night, former Seattle Port Commissioner Bill Bryant laid out his vision for Washington in the last televised debate of the gubernatorial campaign held at Columbia Basin College.

On issues from education, to homelessness, to traffic, Bryant demonstrated a clear-eyed approach to the problems facing the state. He laid out multi-pronged solutions and pledged to be an activist governor who will lead the state and make measurable improvements to the quality of life for residents in every corner of the state.

Regardless of Governor Inslee’s happy talk, independent analysis ranks Washington at the bottom in several key areas:
* Unemployment ranks 8th highest in the nation
* Adult mental health care ranks 50th worst in the nation
* King County traffic ranks 4th worst in the nation
* Homelessness in King County alone has increased 42% during Inslee’s first term

“On the key issues in this election, Governor Inslee’s record is one of failure and we need a governor who will be hands-on in moving us forward,” said Bryant. "I laid out a vision for my four years as governor and fulfilling that vision will require a forward looking, engaged, activist governor. One not adverse to wading into difficult issues, one adept at building coalitions." ###

[** SEND $35 NOW **](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=94b65ff721&e=32f1a3df98)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I just voted. Have you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
My family and I just voted, friends. And I'm counting on you to take advantage of early voting too.
My family and I just voted, friends. And I'm counting on you to take advantage of early voting too.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025d7/2fde7c66/4327d0f8/156adf3f/3272295029/VEsH/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")
---
My family and I just voted, friends. And I'm counting on you to take advantage of early voting too. Beginning today, One-Stop Early Voting locations are open across North Carolina. This means you can register and vote all in one convenient stop at the polls. **[Early voting is easy. If you don't know your polling place, you can find it here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025d7/2fde7c66/4327d0f8/156adf3f/3272295029/VEsE/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")** | | [**Find your polling place ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025d7/2fde7c66/4327d0f8/156adf3f/3272295029/VEsF/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")
---
It's time for North Carolina to work for everyone, not just the select few. That means more money in the pockets of working families, helping small businesses start up and grow, and investing in our education system.
Together, we can make this a reality for all North Carolinians.
**[Find your polling place here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025d7/2fde7c66/4327d0f8/156adf3f/3272295029/VEsC/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")**
Thanks for all you have done so far, but it won't mean anything unless we go and vote. Let's do this.
Roy
P.S. Our team is working around the clock to ramp up our volunteer operation. **[Chip in now to help fund our team.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025d7/2fde7c66/4327d0f8/156adf3e/3272295029/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-earlyvotinghasbegun?utm_campaign=gotv_evfr_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161020_gotv_gq_evfr_ful__rc")**

subject: Puppet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
America doesn’t need a puppet, America needs a leader. |

Friend, you heard me say it last night, Hillary Clinton is a puppet. During her whole career, one thing that stands out is she always pushes the agenda of the elite liberal donor class. She has no principles of her own, and she has never – not even once – put your interests ahead of the Wall Street billionaires and Hollywood liberals who stuff her pockets. America needs an independent thinker, a leader free of the corrupt insiders who use their money to rig things against you. I have spent my whole campaign with one goal in mind, putting someone who will work for the American people back in the White House. Friend, I’m asking you today to make a contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 to our movement because we must fight to Make America Great Again! After last night’s final debate, it is clear I am the qualified choice for President of the United States. Your urgent support is critical today, because if Crooked Hillary gets in the White House she will continue doing the bidding of globalist campaign donors who do not care about the American people. When her donors want open borders, Hillary wants open borders. When her donors want job-killing “free” trade agreements (like TPP), Hillary helps to draft those agreements (and then pretends to oppose them on the campaign trail). When her donors want a 500% increase in Syrian refugees, Hillary falls in line and demands that your neighborhood (but not hers) swing open your doors for un-vetted people from nations filled with terrorists. If you look closely enough during her debates and campaign events, you might even be able to see strings coming up from Crooked Hillary’s arms. America doesn’t need a puppet, America needs a leader. It’s time to cut the cord. Help me put Americans like you first with a pro-jobs, pro-borders, pro-law and order agenda in the White House. Make one donation of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 to end Crooked Hillary’s disastrous puppet show in DC. Thank you! Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Neck-and-neck down the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Join me in helping three great candidates. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcyNzg3OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTYwMTkzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, It's not just our race for governor, or the presidential race, this year that will define Washington's future for years to come. Down-ballot races will have a massive impact on the path our state takes - including tight contests for Secretary of State, Lieutenant Governor, and Commissioner of Public Lands. These down-ballot races are must wins and neck-and-neck with just days before ballots drop. **We 're lucky to have three strong, highly qualified Democrats running in each of these competitive races: Tina Podlodowski for Secretary of State; Cyrus Habib for Lieutenant Governor; and Hilary Franz for Commissioner of Public Lands.** [**Now I 'm asking you to have their backs with a donation split between these three leaders right away.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcyNzg3OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTYwMTkzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) As a first-generation American, **Tina Podlodowski** has made fighting for equality and progress the cornerstone of her life. With more than 30 years of leadership in technology, government, and management, Tina's experience has saved taxpayers millions of dollars, improved public safety, and revolutionized data systems. Her opponent is against the Washington State Voting Rights Act and last week proposed implementing "citizenship checks" \-- a well-known voter suppression tactic. It is long past time we end the 51 years of Republican dominance in this office. Tina is the right person at the right time to expand voter participation in our state. **Cyrus Habib** has served in our State Senate with distinction. As the Democratic Whip, he has forged a reputation as someone working across the aisle to get things done. Although Cyrus lost his eyesight to cancer as a child, he has achieved significant success as an attorney and advocate. _The Washington Post_ has named Cyrus one of the top 40 elected officials in the country under the age of 40, and he is what we need as Lieutenant Governor. His opponent is an anti-choice, anti-labor, anti-environmental conservative radio talk show host who recently questioned whether Cyrus was a legal United States citizen. **Hilary Franz** has lived in Washington state for 20 years and during that time, she has been a passionate advocate for protecting our environment and building a sustainable future. Her environmental work has received national attention and acclaim. As an attorney, Hilary has represented local government, non-profit organizations, and citizen's groups on a broad range of environmental issues. Hilary's opponent has deep and highly disturbing connections with anti-government fringe groups, including those that actively supported the Bundy rancher's armed standoffs in Nevada and Oregon. He is also named on the Southern Poverty Law Center's 2016 Pacific Northwest Hatewatch List. **We must do everything we can to elect Tina, Cyrus, and Hilary this November.** These elections are close and, as governor, I need you to stand with me and do everything you can to help elect them today. **Whether it 's working to protect our right to vote and ensuring fair elections, or working tirelessly in the state legislature to pass budgets and fulfill our constitutional responsibilities, or safeguarding our environment for generations to come, Tina, Cyrus, and Hilary are ready to go to work for all of us.** With so much at stake, I need them standing with me in the weeks and months ahead. [**That 's why I'm asking you to contribute here to directly support their campaigns as we head into the last three weeks of this election.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcyNzg3OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTYwMTkzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0) This election is critical to the future of our state. Thank you for standing with each of us. Your support is greatly appreciated. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTcyNzg3OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTYwMTkzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
Let's review the facts | | Derek, Donald Trump called Hillary a “nasty woman” last night.

Let’s review the facts.

While Hillary was fighting segregation in schools in the 1970s, Donald Trump was being sued for keeping people of color out of his apartment buildings.

While Hillary was making the case that women’s rights are human rights in the 1990s, Donald Trump was making the case for Miss Universe contestants’ heels being higher and bathing suits being tinier.

While Hillary was fighting for first responders after September 11th, 2001, Trump spent that tragic day bragging that his building was now the tallest in all of Manhattan.

And on the day Hillary participated in the mission that brought Osama bin Laden to justice, Trump was hosting an episode of _The Celebrity Apprentice._

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Piling On
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Friend,

Can you believe this? The
ridiculous attacks keep piling on!

I wish I had the time to respond
to every one of them. My opponents have spent over $5 million in
false attacks against me yet we continue to rise in the polls.

So here's one response - you can
watch our latest ad, "Piling On," HERE.

If you can help me keep it
running, please consider pitching in just $25, $50, or even $100.

It's simply the truth that career
politicians will say anything to hold onto power.

But I'll keep talking about high
wage jobs - no matter how much stuff they throw at me!

Greg
Sincerely,
Greg for Montana

subject: Did you miss my offer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Please make it your top priority right now to join our movement by accepting this exclusive invitation. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaVFhBADJVcBTeOoaFZDnDRMN6aaaaFZDnBMASVAca?n=9@uD2AxE&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=b&4=&k=8t9t8zFmyntiFUsTjdFVhkk3w32vFe1dFmFmFam3l&mFm)

Friend, I can't stress enough how much we need you on the Trump Team.
Which is why I have authorized my campaign to place you on the list to receive this _**exclusive**_ , **_non-transferable_** , _**invitation-only**_ limited edition **Trump Black Card.**
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/echbaVFhBADJVcBTeOoaFZDnDRMN6aaaaFZDnBMASVAca?n=9@uD2AxE&X=ki3bseplB0_nfhbs.Vvf&s=Y&4=&k=8t9t8zFmyntiFUsTjdFVhkk3w32vFe1dFmFmFam3l&mFm)
Friend, I need you now more than ever.

| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4d60a4270d&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4d60a4270d&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**October 20, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Vermont Troopers Association Endorses Phil Scott for Governor**
_Highlight Scott’s Commitment to Public Safety and Understanding of Law Enforcement Challenges in Vermont_
Montpelier, Vt. – Today, the Vermont Troopers Association announced its support for Phil Scott for Governor.

“The Vermont Troopers Association is proud to endorse Phil Scott for Governor,” said the Association’s President, Sgt. Michael O’Neil. “Phil has a long track record of working with the law enforcement community and understands the daily challenges of the job. Lt. Governor Scott has said on many occasions that a critical role of government is ensuring public safety. We look forward to working with him in the future to improve fair and impartial law enforcement standards, combat the opiate epidemic, and address the array of issues Troopers face everyday in Vermont,” Sgt. O’Neil added.

“I am grateful to have the support of the Vermont Troopers Association in this race,” said Scott. “Troopers risk their lives every day to ensure the security of all Vermonters and make Vermont one of the safest states in the country to live and raise our families. The opiate epidemic and the destruction it causes in communities and among families has created new and more complex challenges, and as Governor, I will work with the Troopers and the entire law enforcement and public health community to address these challenges,” Scott added.

###

---
| | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8b60378b67&e=19cebfe173)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE October 20, 2016 Media Contact: Ethan Latour mailto:ethan@philscott.org 802-595-3776 Vermont Troopers Association Endorses Phil Scott for Governor Highlight Scott’s Commitment to Public Safety and Understanding of Law Enforcement Challenges in Vermont Montpelier, Vt. – Today, the Vermont Troopers Association announced its support for Phil Scott for Governor. “The Vermont Troopers Association is proud to endorse Phil Scott for Governor,” said the Association’s President, Sgt. Michael O’Neil. “Phil has a long track record of working with the law enforcement community and understands the daily challenges of the job. Lt. Governor Scott has said on many occasions that a critical role of government is ensuring public safety. We look forward to working with him in the future to improve fair and impartial law enforcement standards, combat the opiate epidemic, and address the array of issues Troopers face everyday in Vermont,” Sgt. O’Neil added. “I am grateful to have the support of the Vermont Troopers Association in this race,” said Scott. “Troopers risk their lives every day to ensure the security of all Vermonters and make Vermont one of the safest states in the country to live and raise our families. The opiate epidemic and the destruction it causes in communities and among families has created new and more complex challenges, and as Governor, I will work with the Troopers and the entire law enforcement and public health community to address these challenges,” Scott added. | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Phil Scott For Vermont 2016 46 Three Mile Bridge Rd.
